textByHash.226f235c64667b63dafd3ed2566b036c3d1bc4b2: How are you ? I hope all fares well with you this day!
textByHash.29a38d35f7575681d71f282d9a7aa6874445a3b6: I'd prefer that, if it meant I didn't have to talk to people as inanely happy as you.
textByHash.2c219768f829195a58381f9ac02b441e07b6dfd5: Yes, my husband thinks I'm going a bit mad but I know what I saw! Red eyes, piercing with a terrifying stare. I was so frightened, I fell to the floor!
textByHash.2cd56bf148a041c0a2549934b74a203c81b8b0e6: That attempt at humour merely made me more depressed. Leave me alone.
textByHash.34716da1ba9c76b7a9be866b1aa8b0287f12e461: Hello again sister . What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!
textByHash.41c59937d72da3980556ad61ded09b1698bf8e2e: Thank you so much for your help.
textByHash.4a050e4312ddd0c65809c753d23c22a42fc8deb3: ... It has been too long since last we met!
textByHash.4f7b5f3daf704131a48d147e07c4209f32d2501d: Welcome back brother . It is always a pleasure to see you here!
textByHash.50dbab40dec156efa590287269ee422f2c2af477: Hello again brother . What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!
textByHash.58541a39e29f99d9f9a1bcd34706a46fa15a6e57: Well that's certainly a relief. Thank you for letting me know!
textByHash.6292a28e49ee2f63bf1bdfc718e35fe584a503be: I am afraid not outerlander. Goodbye.
textByHash.642ab798ca4a851bbc9ddd6078fa7bd081050230: I cannot speak to you outerlander! Talk to Brundt, the Chieftain!
textByHash.694941ddcd58a293af546157a8ebf2c65ec5accc: It gets you down after a while, you know. There are 273 shades of grey, you know, and we have them all.
textByHash.90014ff29f06300f55ff11ce67db1ce9bec9737f: Always good to see you sister .
textByHash.962cc6e9c1a5b2f9c630de230f3f09b05474dc32: All is well with me also!
textByHash.a7feb7f2335cd59f6fd92eef78d18adcccb68e30: My apologies sister ! I have not time to tarry here with you!
textByHash.aae1cab00a8b486ff5d04cfdbe79c0be4ee852b3: My apologies brother ! I have not time to tarry here with you!
textByHash.baa9c1ddf2e13b0c5fc6604dd67c2eb8f948376c: Thank goodness! I'll have my husband take those items to the Chieftain for you.
textByHash.bacd7ceae433046d1b855208c9544df3dcf7fb2c: You didn't say. What exactly was it that was outside? My husband didn't tell me what he took to the Chieftain for you.
textByHash.c16ae5b9c9b6bff475c46794fd781f9395226c35: Welcome back sister . It is always a pleasure to see you here!
textByHash.d2fab6fa7d7108270deed37a3db43e5aae9c7b15: Have you looked around the hut yet?
textByHash.d3f6c780bcc847a9b112a34c0f23323511951d5d: A basilisk! In our town! This is how it starts!
textByHash.d92a3f4d7880888f8eb005dc0f335acfcadbc712: My door is always open should you ever need my help .
textByHash.dad821cc0f6fe32b9da1a608e33efd66fd65057e: Thanks again for your help. Make sure you bring anything you find back. I'll make sure my husband delivers it to the Chieftain.
textByHash.e063db0a81ff9f70a2fc5c4f4c43172dede5cbfd: Always good to see you brother .
textByHash.eb00e0aff827a01a06cfe23a82ec64106d50e620: I keep trying to save up enough to leave, but the King keeps taxing us! We have no money left.
textByHash.ed279740b49b22a23a929d6f74a489a4e9d5e777: Yes, you know - peons, plebs, the downtrodden. He treats us like his own personal possessions.
textByHash.f41907109d71ac49595c4cdeeaef645041004ba3: It was the middle of the night, so I couldn't make out what it was. But when I got back on my feet, it wasn't there anymore.
textByHash.f88f554ab1fcfdfbd45866cb89291951bcf5d078: What about the red eyes I saw though?
